labels.note: ruinStarts is labeled as Feature Envy toward RuinListeners because it only forwards ruin lifecycle work to that collaborator.
ruinEnds is labeled as Feature Envy toward RuinListeners because it delegates ruin completion behavior to that collaborator.
removed is labeled as Feature Envy toward RuinListeners because it forwards removal events directly to that collaborator.
StateManager combines route state, activity state, lifecycle listener wiring, insertion events, and ruin events in one large class.
getRouteState(VehicleRoute, StateId, Class) mixes indexed storage lookup, map lookup, type casting, and exception conversion in one method.
getRouteState(VehicleRoute, Vehicle, StateId, Class) combines vehicle-dependent key lookup, indexed storage lookup, map lookup, type casting, and exception conversion.
